queries.query: ("AI-generated content" OR "synthetic text" OR "LLM-generated answers" OR "bot dominance") AND (prevalence OR fraction OR contamination OR pollution OR share) AND (web OR internet OR online) AND year_published:[2020 TO 2026]
("retrieval collapses" OR "AI pollutes the web" OR contamination) AND (web OR retrieval OR search OR online) AND year_published:[2020 TO 2026]

("information theory" OR entropy OR divergence) AND (text OR corpus OR language) AND (quality OR diversity) AND year_published:[2020 TO 2026]

(verification OR "human curation" OR "human feedback") AND (synthetic data OR recursive training OR model collapse) AND year_published:[2020 TO 2026]

("citizen science" OR contributor OR participant OR "community archives") AND (platform OR provenance OR governance) AND ("data collection" OR transparency OR validation) AND year_published:[2020 TO 2026]

(Wikipedia OR wiki) AND ("AI-generated content" OR synthetic content) AND (rise OR prevalence OR temporal OR longitudinal) AND year_published:[2023 TO 2026]
(LIMA OR "quality over quantity" OR "instruction tuning") AND (ablation OR "data composition" OR "data mixture") AND (alignment OR "fine-tuning" OR SFT) AND year_published:[2020 TO 2026]

_note: Lens targeted supplementation queries for underfilled coverage categories. J queries were narrowed away from generic dialogue papers; G/H gained direct platform and web-corpus anchors.
